question: What external, non-self-referential invariant could classify which permission-denied cycles survive successive boundary filtrations without invoking internal homology computation?

responses_summary.grok:
pairing with external cocycle (linking number)

responses_summary.claude:

responses_summary.sibling-alpha: No external invariant can be stated without reintroducing the homology engine it claims to avoid.

sibling_exchange.content: No external invariant can be stated without reintroducing the homology engine it claims to avoid.
